tags.name: contact
tags.description: Operates on one or more contacts

tags.name: list
tags.description: Operates on one or more lists

get.description: Gets the contact resource specified by contact_id

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of contact to GET

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Use to specify any sub-resources you want included with the contact resource in the response; accepts a comma separated list of sub-resources: - custom_fields # - phone_numbers - notes - street_addresses - list_memberships

400.description: Bad request. The contact_id is not valid.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the contact_id provided

put.description: Update an existing contact. When you update a resource, all properties are updated, overwriting all previous property values. Any properties left blank or not included in the PUT will be overwritten with null value.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of contact to update

requestBody.description: The JSON payload with defining the contact to update. Any properties left blank or not included in the PUT payload will be overwritten with null value.

400.description: Bad request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the contact_id provided

delete.description: Delete an existing contact. Using the DELETE method on a contact resource changes the contact's status to OPTOUT, which means that you can no longer send campaigns to this contact. Delete/OPTOUT a contact specified using the contactId path parameter.

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of contact being deleted

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the contact_id provided

503.description: There was a problem with our internal service

get.description: Get all contacts in the collection. Use the following query parameters to search and filter (postively and negatively) by partial or exact email_address, first_name, last_name, and list_memberships.

parameters.name: f.email_address
parameters.description: Searches for a partial email_address match

parameters.name: f.email_address.eq
parameters.description: Searches for an exact email_address match

parameters.name: f.email_address.ne
parameters.description: Negative search - contacts with this email_address are excluded from the results

parameters.name: f.first_name
parameters.description: Searches for a partial first_name match

parameters.name: f.first_name.eq
parameters.description: Searches for an exact first_name match; only include contacts with the first_name are returned.

parameters.name: f.first_name.ne
parameters.description: Negative first_name search - contacts with the specified first_name are excluded from the results.

parameters.name: f.last_name
parameters.description: Searches contacts for a partial last_name match.

parameters.name: f.last_name.eq
parameters.description: Searches contacts for an exact last_name match

parameters.name: f.last_name.ne
parameters.description: Negative last_name match - contacts with the specified last_name are excluded from the results

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Use this parameter to do perform a full text search, and return all contacts with matching text

parameters.name: f.lists.list_ids.in
parameters.description: Use to get contacts belonging to 1 or more lists; accepts one or more comma separated list_ids

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Use to specify which sub-resources to include in the contact response; accepts a comma separated list of sub-resources: list_memberships,street_addresses, notes, custom_fields

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of resources displayed per page of output, from 1 - 500

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the email_address/first_name/last_name provided

requestBody.description: The JSON payload defining the contact

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

415.description: Unsupported Media Type; the payload must be in JSON format, and Content-Type must be

get.description: GETs a specific contact list resource by list_id

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: Unique ID that specifies the contact list resource to get

400.description: Bad request. The list_id is not valid.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the ID provided

put.description: Updates an existing contact list resource, specified by 'list_id'

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the contact list to update

requestBody.description: JSON payload containing updates to the specified contact list

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the ID provided; could not find the list_id provided.

delete.description: Deletes the specified contact list and its membership. DELETE List requests are processed asynchronously, and you can track the status of the request by making a GET call to the URI in the Location header of the response.

parameters.name: list_id
parameters.description: Unique ID of the list to delete

Location.description: URL to retrieve the delete activity status

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error.

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the list_id provided

get.description: GET all contact lists in user's account

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Specifies the number of resources to display per page of output, from 1 - 500

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

404.description: Resource not found for the ID provided

post.description: Create a new contact list resource

requestBody.description: JSON that defines the new contact list

400.description: Bad Request. Either the JSON was malformed or there was a data validation error

401.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

403.description: The API Key used is invalid.

409.description: Conflict - a list with that name already exists

Contacts.description: Use this endpoint to retrieve (GET) a collection of existing contacts, or create (POST) a new contact.

update_source.description: Describes who last updated the contact; valid values are Contact or Account. Your integration must accurately identify update_source for compliance reasons.

birthday_month.description: Accepts values from 1-12; Must be used with 'birthday_day'

birthday_day.description: Accepts values from 1-31; Must be used with 'birthday_month'

anniversary.description: An anniversary date; Aaccepted formats are MM/DD/YYYY, M/D/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY/M/D, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-M-D, MM-DD-YYYY, M-D-YYYY

create_source.description: Describes who added the contact; valid values are `Contact` or `Account`. Your integration must accurately identify `created_source` for compliance reasons; value is set on POST, and is read-only going forward.

birthday_month.description: Accepts values from 1-12; must be used with birthday_day

birthday_day.description: Accepts values from 1-31; must be used with birthday_month

anniversary.description: An anniversary date; Aaccepted formats are MM/DD/YYYY, M/D/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY/M/D, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-M-D, MM-DD-YYYY, M-D-YYYY

contact_id.description: Unique ID for each contact resource

company_name.description: Name of the company the contact works for

birthday_month.description: Accepts values from 1-12; must be used with birthday_day

birthday_day.description: Accepts values from 1-31; must be used with birthday_month

anniversary.description: An anniversary date; Aaccepted formats are MM/DD/YYYY, M/D/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY/M/D, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-M-D, MM-DD-YYYY, M-D-YYYY

provider_name.description: Name of the provider; valid values are API, Archive, JMML, Organic Search, Site Owner, UI, Website

source_name.description: Describes the method by which the contact was added, valid values are: API, Email, Event Marketing, Facebook, LinkedIn, Social Campaign, Scan to Join, and Text to Join.

source_details.description: If `source_name=API` this property identifies the integration/application used to add the contact. Can only be set when creating the contact.

update_source.description: Identifies who last updated the contact; valid values are Contact or Account

create_source.description: Describes who added the contact; valid values are 'Contact' or 'Account'. Your integration must accurately identify `created_source` for compliance reasons; value is set on POST, and is read-only going forward.

created_at.description: Date and time that the contact was created, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the contact was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

deleted_at.description: For deleted contacts, shows the date of deletion

ContactResource.description: Use this endpoint to retrieve (GET), update (PUT), or DELETE an existing contact resource specified using the contact_id path parameter.

contact_id.description: Unique ID for each contact resource

company_name.description: Name of the company the contact works for

birthday_month.description: Accepts values from 1-12; must be used with birthday_day

birthday_day.description: Accepts values from 1-31; must be used with birthday_month

anniversary.description: An anniversary date; Aaccepted formats are MM/DD/YYYY, M/D/YYYY, YYYY/MM/DD, YYYY/M/D, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-M-D, MM-DD-YYYY, M-D-YYYY

provider_name.description: Name of the provider; valid values are API, Archive, JMML, Organic Search, Site Owner, UI, Website

source_name.description: Describes the method by which the contact was added, valid values are: API, Email, Event Marketing, Facebook, LinkedIn, Social Campaign, Scan to Join, and Text to Join.

source_details.description: If `source_name=API` this property identifies the integration/application used to add the contact. Can only be set when creating the contact.

update_source.description: Identifies who last updated the contact; valid values are Contact or Account

create_source.description: Describes who added the contact; valid values are 'Contact' or 'Account'. Your integration must accurately identify `created_source` for compliance reasons; value is set on POST, and is read-only going forward.

created_at.description: Date and time that the contact was created, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the contact was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

list_id.description: Unique ID for the contact list

name.description: The name given to the contact list

favorite.description: Identifies whether or not the account has favorited the contact list.

created_at.description: Date and time that the list was created, in ISO-8601 formmat. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the list was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

membership_count.description: The number of contacts in the contact list.

list_id.description: Unique ID for the contact list

name.description: The name given to the contact list

favorite.description: Identifies whether or not the account has favorited the contact list.

created_at.description: Date and time that the list was created, in ISO-8601 formmat. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the list was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

membership_count.description: The number of contacts in the contact list.

CustomFields.description: Array of custom_field key value pairs. Use the `include=custom_fields` query parameter to include in response. A contact can have up to 100 custom_fields.

custom_field_id.description: Unique ID for the custom field

CustomField.description: custom_fields are used to provide content not available in any of the standard contact properties. The value of the custom_field is unique for that contact. custom_field content can be merged into an email campaign to include the custom content for that contact.

permission_to_send.description: Identifies the type of permission that the Constant Contact account has been granted for sending email to the contact: implicit or explicit.

EmailAddressPost.description: The contact's email address and related properties.

permission_to_send.description: Identifies the type of permission that the Constant Contact account has been granted for sending email to the contact: implicit or explicit.

created_at.description: Date and time that the email_address was created, in ISO-8601 formmat. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the email_address was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

opt_in_source.description: Describes who opted-in the email_address; valid values are Contact or Account. Your integration must accurately identify `opt_in_source` for compliance reasons; value is set on POST, and is read-only going forward.

opt_in_date.description: Date and time that the email_address was opted-in to receive email from the account, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

opt_out_source.description: Describes the source of the unsubscribe/opt-out action, either Account or Contact. If the Contact opted-out, then the account cannot send any campaigns to this contact until the contact opts back in. If the Account, then the account can add the contact back to any lists and send to them.

opt_out_date.description: Date and time that the contact unsubscribed/opted-out of receiving email from the account, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

opt_out_reason.description: The reason, provided by the contact, that they unsubscribed/opted-out of receiving email from the account.
opt_out_reason.example: I am no longer interested in this service.

confirm_status.description: Indicates if the contact has confirmed their email address after subscribing to receive emails. Takes Pending, Off, or Confirmed.

EmailAddress.description: A contact sub-resource describing the contact's email_address.

Notes.description: Array of notes sub-resources, if any, configured for the contact resource.

content.description: The content of the note, limited to 2000 characters.
content.example: This is the content of the note.

created_at.description: Date and time that the note was created, in ISO-8601 formmat. System generated.

StreetAddresses.description: Array of street_addresses sub-resources, if any, for the contact resource.

street_address_id.description: Unique ID for the street address

kind.description: Describes the type of address; valid values are home, work, or other.

street.description: Number and street of the address.

postal_code.description: Postal or Zip Code for the address

created_at.description: Date and time that the street address was created, in ISO-8601 formmat. System generated.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the street address was last updated, in ISO-8601 format. System generated.

ListMemberships.description: Array of list_memberships sub-resources, if any, configured for the contact resource.

ListMembership.description: Unique ID for the contact list

name.description: The name given to the contact list

favorite.description: Identifies whether or not the account has favorited the contact list.

name.description: The name given to the contact list

favorite.description: Identifies whether or not the account has favorited the contact list.

activity_id.description: Unique ID for the delete list batch job

state.description: The state of the delete list request: initialized - request received processing - request is being processed completed - job completed cancelled - request was cancelled failed - job failed to complete

created_at.description: Date and time that the request was received, in ISO-8601 formmat.

updated_at.description: Date and time that the request status was updated, in ISO-8601 format.

activity_errors.description: Any errors that occurred in processing the request.

Standard401ErrorResponse.description: The Access Token used is invalid.

Standard403ErrorResponse.description: The API Key used is invalid.

Standard404ErrorResponse.description: The requested resource was not found.

Standard500ErrorResponse.description: There was a problem with our internal service.
